title: Making GBP Changes
content_md:
# Making GBP Changes

- Code: d60fff60
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=d60fff60a37e49ffbd3d2ed9f56ffcaf
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/e39a275d69b54d43872534d97d7c0368?sid=cf7b97a3-cf87-41ce-80a7-cd1e96744f3b?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 3m 0s

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: I want to talk about some warnings for GVP changes just so you don't end up in a worse
situation than you were to begin with.
Anytime you make changes to a GVP, there is a chance that that GVP is going to be suspended
or trigger a re-verification.
If you change the Google Business Profile business name, then it's a high likelihood
of being re-verified.
If you change the address or add a visible address to service area business, also a very
high likelihood.
If you add categories, then it's very likely to encounter a soft suspension, which may
then require a re-verification, especially depending on what the primary category is
if you're in your life, YLTED categories.
So in general, make changes slowly and make them over time.
If you're adding a bunch of categories, add one every few weeks to one every month or
go ahead and change everything all at once.
Just be ready to trigger a re-verification and record the new video.
One very critical aspect is the GVP landing page.
If your GVP is ranking, if you look at the rank map and it's better than 20 plus anywhere
on the rank map, if you change the GVP landing page to a different URL, you are very likely
going to hurt the rank position in the short term at least.
I've often mentioned an example where we landed a new client with eight locations and
normally we would want those eight locations to go to eight different landing pages.
For this client, all eight were pointing to the home page.
We checked the rank position.
Four of them were ranked in the top three everywhere.
Two of them were average ranking 10 or 11 and two of them were 20 plus.
So the two that were 20 plus, we moved them to a different GVP landing page.
We kept everything else the same.
So just be aware that when you make changes to the GVP and generally the more important
the box you're changing, the more careful you need to be.
You could trigger a suspension, you could trigger a re-verification, you could trigger
a soft suspension or you could tank ranking.
So what we're going to cover is the correct quote unquote, the correct optimum way to
set up a GVP.
The one that you're looking at needs a lot of changes to get from where they are to
this correct version.
You need to stop before you make changes and think to yourself, am I okay with triggering
a suspension?
Am I okay with triggering a re-verification?
Am I okay with all the rankings going into 20 plus because I've made these changes?
Okay.
GVP changes are not to be made lightly.
Do it carefully, do it slowly and make sure you watch the rank map so that you understand
that the worst case scenario, okay, if they're already 20 plus everywhere, worst case scenario
is not so bad.
If they're 10 plus average, well, then be careful making changes.
